meta.title: About — Safraz Razik
meta.description: AI-accelerated software engineering by Safraz Razik. 15+ years of full-stack development and startup co-founding.

hero.description: I'm Safraz Razik — a senior software engineer with 15+ years across startups, independent products and Motorola Solutions. Through Zetmel, I design, build, review and recover software using structured AI-assisted workflows and hands-on engineering ownership.

intro.heading: Engineering with AI acceleration
paragraphs: I'm Safraz Razik — founder of Zetmel, an AI-accelerated software engineering studio. I'm a software professional with 15+ years in full-stack development, project leadership, and startup co-founding.

My expertise spans modern JavaScript frameworks (React, Vue, TypeScript, Next.js), backend systems (Node.js, PHP, Python), and enterprise platforms like Oracle Commerce Cloud and Oracle Storefront Framework.

What sets my work apart today is the integration of AI into the engineering process. I run local LLM environments (Ollama, OpenCode, Claude Code), evaluate coding models (Qwen, Llama, DeepSeek) for code quality and task fit, and use structured prompting and context-management workflows.

facts.title: Open Source
facts.description: Vue File Agent, Rockplate, and more.

principles.heading: How I work
principles.lead: Three principles guide every project I take on.

items.title: Deep Experience
items.description: 15+ years shipping production software across the stack — web, mobile, desktop, and enterprise. Seasoned engineering judgment to guide every project.

items.title: AI-Accelerated
items.description: Local LLM environments (Ollama, OpenCode, Claude Code) with structured prompting and context-management workflows. Model evaluation for code quality and task fit.

items.title: Production-Ready
items.description: Technical audits, structured milestones, and recovery sprints ensure every deliverable meets production standards. No shortcuts on quality.

faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.lead: Common questions about working with me.

items.question: What types of projects do you take on?
items.answer: I build web applications, mobile apps, developer tools, and enterprise solutions. Recent work includes B2B commerce platforms, open-source libraries, and AI-accelerated development workflows.

items.question: How does AI fit into your workflow?
items.answer: I use local LLM environments (Ollama, OpenCode) for research, architecture, implementation, debugging, code review, and technical auditing. Every AI-generated change goes through a structured review before reaching production.

items.question: What's your experience with enterprise platforms?
items.answer: I spent 4+ years at Motorola Solutions as a Senior Frontend Engineer, leading the transition from legacy Oracle Commerce Cloud to a React-based Oracle Storefront Framework.

items.question: What open-source tools have you built?
items.answer: I created Vue File Agent (a Vue.js file upload component) and Rockplate (a JavaScript template engine). Both are available on GitHub.

items.question: Do you contribute to open source?
items.answer: Yes. Beyond my own projects, I contribute to libraries and tools I use in production. Open source is a core part of how I learn and give back to the community.

openSource.heading: Tools I've built
openSource.description: Libraries and components released to the developer community.

cards.title: Vue File Agent
cards.text: A feature-rich Vue.js file upload component with drag-and-drop, multi-file support, and image previews. View on GitHub

cards.title: Rockplate
cards.text: A lightweight JavaScript template engine for Node.js and the browser, focused on simplicity and performance. View on GitHub

cards.title: More on GitHub
cards.text: Browse my GitHub profile for additional projects, contributions, and experiments. github.com/safrazik

cta.heading: Have a project in mind?
cta.description: Whether it's a new build or something that needs a fresh perspective — I'd love to hear about it.

meta.title: Services — AI-Accelerated Software Engineering | Zetmel
meta.description: AI-accelerated product development, product recovery, modernization, technical review, developer tools and technical leadership by Safraz Razik.

hero.description: Work directly with a senior engineer on product development, recovery, modernization or technical review. Engagements are shaped around the actual product problem rather than a fixed agency package.

design.heading: Build with senior engineering ownership
paragraphs: Turn a product concept into a working application with clear architecture, milestones and production-minded implementation. I use AI-assisted workflows to accelerate research, planning, implementation and review while retaining direct responsibility for every engineering decision.
This is not a code-generation service. It's a structured, human-led engineering engagement that uses AI as a force multiplier.

included.text: Understand users, business rules, risks and success criteria before writing code.
Define a clear technical foundation with typed schemas, predictable data flow and maintainable structure.
Break work into reviewable stages with acceptance criteria at every step.
Generation, review, refinement and testing in a structured, human-led loop.
Deployment, documentation and handover for a working, usable release.

development.heading: Audit, prioritize and recover
paragraphs: An unfinished MVP, an AI-generated application that feels incomplete, a project that lost momentum — I audit the product, identify architectural and experience gaps, prioritize the work and execute focused recovery sprints.
AI can produce a surprising amount of software quickly. It can also produce inconsistent architecture, missing workflows, raw interfaces and hidden technical debt.

included.text: Assess architecture, code quality, missing workflows, UI gaps and technical risk.
Prioritize gaps into structured sprints with clear completion criteria.
Fix the highest-impact issues in focused, measurable iterations.
Polish interfaces, complete user flows and improve the feeling of a finished product.
Deliver a coherent, maintainable codebase with documentation for the next phase.

performance.heading: Move forward without starting over
paragraphs: Established systems carry real business logic, user data and operational history. I help teams incrementally migrate or refactor legacy interfaces and architectures while protecting business continuity.
Modernization is a technical problem with human constraints. I focus on pragmatic, testable steps that deliver value at each stage.

included.text: Move older JavaScript, Angular, Knockout, jQuery or PHP templates toward a modern component architecture.
Transition from legacy OCC or similar platforms to React-based frameworks.
Improve codebase structure one module at a time without freezing the product.
Identify and resolve load-time, rendering and data-fetching bottlenecks.
Add types, testing, documentation and consistent patterns to improve long-term health.

process.heading: A clear, honest process
process.lead: Understand the problem. Build a solution. Review and improve. Ship and iterate.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: A conversation about your goals, your product and what success looks like. No obligation.

steps.title: Proposal
steps.description: A clear scope, timeline and cost. One page, plain language, fixed price.

steps.title: Build & Review
steps.description: Short cycles with regular check-ins. You see the product evolve as it's built.

steps.title: Launch & Support
steps.description: Deploy, hand over, stay available. Iteration after launch is straightforward.

cta.heading: Have a project in mind?
cta.description: Send a short note about what you're building or improving. I read every message and reply within a working day.

meta.title: Safraz Razik — Founder & Senior Software Engineer | Zetmel
meta.description: Safraz Razik is a founder and senior software engineer with 15+ years of experience. Zetmel provides AI-accelerated product development, modernization, technical review and product recovery.

hero.description: Founder of Zetmel, an AI-accelerated software engineering studio. 15+ years of full-stack development, project leadership, and startup co-founding.

services.heading: Where Zetmel can help
services.lead: Work directly with a senior engineer on product development, recovery, modernization or technical review.

cards.title: Product Development
cards.description: Design and build web applications through a structured, human-led process that uses AI for faster research, planning, implementation and review.

cards.title: Product Recovery
cards.description: Audit an incomplete or unstable product, identify the gaps and execute focused recovery sprints to move it toward a credible release.

cards.title: Modernization
cards.description: Move legacy interfaces and systems toward maintainable modern architecture without ignoring business continuity.

cards.title: Technical Review
cards.description: Get an experienced assessment of architecture, code quality, technical risk and the path to completion.

cards.title: Developer Tools
cards.description: Create internal tools, libraries and specialist software when standard products don't fit the workflow.

cards.title: Technical Leadership
cards.description: Architecture decisions, code review, mentoring and engineering standards for teams that need senior direction.

productRecovery.heading: Generated code is a starting point—not a finished product.
productRecovery.description: AI can produce a surprising amount of software quickly. It can also produce inconsistent architecture, missing workflows, raw interfaces and hidden technical debt. My recovery process combines product review, technical auditing and prioritized implementation to move the application toward a credible release.

portfolio.heading: Projects I've built
portfolio.lead: From enterprise commerce modernization to open-source tools and startup products.

testimonials.heading: Trusted for difficult work and clear ownership.

items.quote: Absolutely perfect! Where others were intimidated, this guy tackled my task, saw through the noise and came up with a very elegant solution. Highest recommendation as a technologist and as a cooperative partner.
items.name: Ken

items.quote: It was a complete joy working with him, and I recommend him wholeheartedly. The best part is his attitude — 'Consider it done'. His work exceeded my expectations.
items.name: Mike

items.quote: He is fast and his code quality is stellar.
items.name: Zaid
